chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No.S-201 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 14-03-2025 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G a/w ASI Manzoor Ahmed Langah of P.S, Khanpur Mahar. **** Learned AAG submits that official respondents will act strictly in accordance with law. Since this petition is filed against the harassment and for seeking protection; therefore, it is being disposed of with directions to the official respondents to provide protection to the petitioner, as and when required. Office is directed to communicate copy of this order to SSP, Ghotki for compliance. JUDGE Ahmad
